metadata.title: OWASP MCP Top 10 → AppSec Core V1 (with ACR-001, ACR-002, ACR-004 incorporated) (Concept Crosswalk)
metadata.schema-basis: NIST IR 8477 relationship vocabulary + NIST IR 8278A r1 STRM resource model

reference-document.title: AppSec Core V1 (with ACR-001, ACR-002, ACR-004 incorporated)
reference-document.author: SbD-ToE Programme — AppSec Core ontology project

metadata.methodology: Threshold-based continuous→categorical translation: sim≥0.6 → equal; 0.4≤sim<0.6 → intersects-with; sim<0.4 → unspecified. Multi-claim per source-item: one row per (source-item, target-Core-entity) unique pair using highest-similarity claim for that target. is-primary="true" marks item overall highest-similarity claim's target. subset-of / superset-of NOT in first cut (cosine similarity lacks directional info; SME refinement future work). STRM resource model: pilot doc → DocumentaryImpl; source-item → ConcreteImpl; AppSec Core V1 → Reference Document; Core entity → Concept.

source-element.description: Token Mismanagement & Secret Exposure. Hard-coded credentials, long-lived tokens, and secrets stored in model memory or protocol logs can expose sensitive environments to unauthorized access.Attacker…

reference-element.description: Secret Isolation Across Technical Surfaces. Separate secret use by environment, workload and execution surface so compromise does not propagate broadly. identity and trust control. isolation

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.613; threshold mapping → equal. Claim OWASP_MCP_TOP_10_V0_1_2025_BETA-CLAIM-000001 at Practice level. Primary anchor (item highest-similarity claim).

source-element.description: Token Mismanagement & Secret Exposure. Hard-coded credentials, long-lived tokens, and secrets stored in model memory or protocol logs can expose sensitive environments to unauthorized access.Attacker…

reference-element.description: Session And Token Trust Boundaries. Sessions and tokens must be unguessable, transported securely, bounded in scope and lifetime, and revalidated or revoked when client context materially changes. Se…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.603; threshold mapping → equal. Claim OWASP_MCP_TOP_10_V0_1_2025_BETA-CLAIM-000002 at ControlObjective level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: Token Mismanagement & Secret Exposure. Hard-coded credentials, long-lived tokens, and secrets stored in model memory or protocol logs can expose sensitive environments to unauthorized access.Attacker…

reference-element.description: Bounded Session And Token Management. Keep session identifiers and tokens bounded by transport, scope, TTL and explicit invalidation rules. identity and trust control. session management

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.577; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_MCP_TOP_10_V0_1_2025_BETA-CLAIM-000003 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: Token Mismanagement & Secret Exposure. Hard-coded credentials, long-lived tokens, and secrets stored in model memory or protocol logs can expose sensitive environments to unauthorized access.Attacker…

reference-element.description: Short-Lived Token Controls. Keep session identifiers and tokens bounded by transport, scope, TTL and explicit invalidation rules. The current semantic anchor comes mostly from adjacent operational-id…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.516; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_MCP_TOP_10_V0_1_2025_BETA-CLAIM-000004 at Mechanism level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: Token Mismanagement & Secret Exposure. Hard-coded credentials, long-lived tokens, and secrets stored in model memory or protocol logs can expose sensitive environments to unauthorized access.Attacker…

reference-element.description: Log Integrity And Protected Access. Protect security records against tampering and uncontrolled access. integrity traceability and records. integrity protection

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.511; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_MCP_TOP_10_V0_1_2025_BETA-CLAIM-000005 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.501; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_MCP_TOP_10_V0_1_2025_BETA-CLAIM-000006 at Mechanism level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: Token Mismanagement & Secret Exposure. Hard-coded credentials, long-lived tokens, and secrets stored in model memory or protocol logs can expose sensitive environments to unauthorized access.Attacker…

reference-element.description: Security-Relevant Configuration Integrity And Override Control. Security-relevant configuration must remain protected from uncontrolled change, injection or silent override across build, deploy and r…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.463; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_MCP_TOP_10_V0_1_2025_BETA-CLAIM-000007 at ControlObjective level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: Token Mismanagement & Secret Exposure. Hard-coded credentials, long-lived tokens, and secrets stored in model memory or protocol logs can expose sensitive environments to unauthorized access.Attacker…

reference-element.description: Non-Revealing Error Surface Control. Keep client-visible failures controlled, generic and resistant to information leakage or enumeration. policy and gate enforcement. error surface control

reference-element.description: Threat Traceability Into Requirements And Validation. Keep explicit links from identified threats into mitigations, backlog work and validation evidence. integrity traceability and records. traceabil…

reference-element.description: API Gateway With Mutual Authentication. Review trust boundaries and integration paths explicitly before accepting exposure or interface changes. Bind service interactions to explicit trusted identiti…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.431; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_MCP_TOP_10_V0_1_2025_BETA-CLAIM-000012 at Mechanism level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: Privilege Escalation via Scope Creep. Temporary or loosely defined permissions within MCP servers often expand over time, granting agents excessive capabilities. An attacker exploiting weak scope enf…

reference-element.description: Secret Scope And Binding Controls. Bind pipeline, workload and deploy actions to explicit operational identities and prefer federated or short-lived credentials where possible. Separate secret use by…

reference-element.description: Access Policy Enforcement. Keep permission models explicit, separated by role or attribute and bounded by least-privilege rules. Authenticate callers and enforce authorization decisions consistently …

source-element.description: Software Supply Chain Attacks & Dependency Tampering. MCP ecosystems depend on open-source packages, connectors, and model-side plug-ins that may contain malicious or vulnerable components. A comprom…

reference-element.description: Dependency Inventory And SBOM Traceability. Maintain a build-linked inventory of third-party components and generated SBOMs for produced artifacts. A software component inventory exists per build or …

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.435; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_MCP_TOP_10_V0_1_2025_BETA-CLAIM-000023 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: Command Injection & Execution. Command injection in MCP environments occurs when an AI agent constructs and executes system commands, shell scripts, API calls, or code snippets using untrusted input—…

reference-element.description: Injection-Resistant Input Handling And Dangerous Pattern Exclusion. Input-handling paths must avoid dangerous execution and injection patterns and use safe query, rendering and parsing primitives ins…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.483; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_MCP_TOP_10_V0_1_2025_BETA-CLAIM-000024 at ControlObjective level. Primary anchor (item highest-similarity claim).

source-element.description: Prompt Injection via Contextual Payloads. This risk is analogous to classic injection attacks (e.g., XSS, SQLi), but in the MCP world the “interpreter” is the model and the “payload” is text (or any …

reference-element.description: Dangerous Pattern Exclusion. Detect and block dangerous input-handling patterns such as permissive execution, unsafe rendering and injection-prone constructs. validation and analysis. pattern exclusi…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.464; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_MCP_TOP_10_V0_1_2025_BETA-CLAIM-000026 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: Lack of Audit and Telemetry. Without comprehensive activity logging and real-time alerting, unauthorized actions or data access may go undetected. Limited telemetry from MCP servers and agents impede…

reference-element.description: Access Abuse Detection And Auditability. Access surfaces must emit sufficient telemetry to detect abuse, prove rejected access and audit externally visible calls with reviewable context. Rate limits,…
